title: Onboarding - Navigating through onboarding screens
scenario: User can swipe left/right or tap Continue to navigate through the three onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal)
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Observe the onboarding flow that appears on first launch (or after clearing app data).
3. On the first onboarding screen ("Organized"), swipe left to navigate to the next screen.
4. On the "Up-to-Date" screen, swipe left again to navigate to the next screen.
5. On the "Personal" screen, swipe right to navigate back to the "Up-to-Date" screen.
6. On any onboarding screen, tap the "Continue" button to advance to the next screen.
7. On the final screen ("Personal"), tap "Continue" to complete onboarding and proceed to the Home screen.
expected: User can smoothly scroll left and right through all three onboarding screens ("Organized", "Up-to-Date", "Personal") by swiping or tapping "Continue". On the final screen, tapping "Continue" completes onboarding and navigates to the Home screen.
